message:
test(emoji): add unit tests for renderables/emoji.rs (bd-3llj)

Add comprehensive unit tests for the Emoji renderable module:
- NoEmoji error type: display, debug, clone, Error trait
- Emoji::new(): valid/invalid names, empty string, String input
- Emoji::style() and variant() builder methods
- Emoji::name() getter
- Emoji::render(): basic, styled, with variants

Also includes formatting fixes from concurrent agent work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
